chunks.text: Christos Papadimitriou wins ABZ Gold Platinum ETH Medal for CS and CS Education - EECS at Berkeley ETH Zürich (Swiss Federal Institute of Technology in Zurich) has awarded CS Prof. Christos Papadimitriou the ABZ Gold Platinum Medal at a ceremony in Switzerland. This Medal is awarded to individuals who have fundamentally contributed to the development of computer science and the practice of computer science education. Previous recipients include Niklaus Wirth, Donald Knuth, David Harel, and Ronald Rivest. Categories Education Faculty Honors Research View Open Faculty Positions
